subcodes.first_line: Open Thou the portals of hope, and from the bounties of heaven bestow upon them a share. Turn this gloomy night into day, and cause the day of Naw-Rúz to become blessed
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این دوستان یاران تواند و سرمست پیمانه پیمان تو همه پرورده آغوش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
